name: books_import
description: Demo: import a books CSV into the quackage sqlite bookstore harness via pict-section-dataimport.

scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy

author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>

ExampleApplication.Title: Books Import (harness)
ExampleApplication.Summary: pict-section-dataimport: import a books CSV into the bookstore harness (Meadow schema + EntityProvider push). Runtime needs retold-harness on :8086.
